source_scale_rule: Keep every part at this common source-pixel scale. Apply character size only once at the assembled root transform; never normalize individual alpha bounds.
limb_reference_direction: All long limbs are stored horizontally with proximal joint on the left and distal joint on the right.

foot_root_convention.definition: The canonical world root is the lowest opaque sole point of the currently planted boot after all joint transforms. For the baseline left-facing pose, use near-boot.foot_contact.
foot_root_convention.rule: Never derive the root from a per-frame alpha bounding box. Keep the same source scale and place the selected foot_contact on the world ground line.
